name: Midazolam
description: I-benzodiazepine yexesha elifutshane kunye nokuqala ngokukhawuleza. Ekhethwayo kwi-procedural sedation, i-RSI pre-medication, kunye nolawulo lwe-IM/IN lokubamba. Iindlela ze-IM kunye ne-intranasal zibonelela ngenzuzo ebalulekileyo kwizicwangciso zentsimi.
dose: I-sedation: 0.05-0.1 mg / kg IV titrated. Inkqubo: 1-5 mg IV tyhala kancinci. IM: 0.2 mg/kg. IN: 0.2 mg / kg (max 10 mg). Isimo se-epilepticus IM: 10 mg IM (omdala).
contraindications: Ukuxiliswa kotywala ngokugqithisileyo kunye nokuhambelana kwentliziyo
warnings: Ukudakumba kokuphefumla--jonga indlela yomoya, yiba ne-agent yokubuyisela umva (flumazenil) ukuba ikhona.
Inaliti ye-IV ekhawulezayo ibangela i-apnea --tyhala kancinci.

pediatric.dose: I-sedation: 0.05-0.1 mg / kg IV. IM: 0.1-0.2 mg / kg. IN: 0.2-0.3 mg / kg. Ukubanjwa kwe-IM: 0.2 mg / kg (ubuninzi be-10 mg).
pediatric.note: INDLELA iluncedo ngakumbi ebantwaneni -- inqanda ukufikelela kwi-IV.

obstetric.note: Unqumla i-placenta. I-sedation yosana kunokwenzeka. Sebenzisa ubuncinane bedosi esebenzayo; ukubeka iliso kwimveku ukuba inikwe kufutshane nonikezelo.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Procedural Sedation Guidelines
